global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with promotional text and a mobile device outline.
global.main_message: Promoting discounts and free shipping on products.

elements.label: Abstract orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background with abstract shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Layered orange design
elements.description: A layered design in varying shades of orange, adding depth to the background.

elements.label: Mobile device outline
elements.description: An outline of a mobile device in a light color, positioned centrally with a blank screen.

elements.label: Circular icons
elements.description: Two circular icons below the mobile device outline, simple and minimalistic.

elements.label: ThreadMark logo
elements.description: The logo 'ThreadMarF' displayed prominently in bold, dark text at the top.

elements.label: Discount offer text
elements.description: Text stating 'Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25' in a clear, readable font, centrally positioned.

elements.label: Additional offer text
elements.description: Text '$4.99' in a bold font, indicating a price, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A button labeled 'Learn more' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Element
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the discount offer text in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
